cmd: bash -c cd projects/LMCache/src && python3 -m pytest -p no:cacheprovider tests/v1/test_mem_kernels.py tests/v1/test_mp_mem_kernels.py tests/v1/test_c_ops_fallback_parity.py tests/v1/test_python_ops_fallback.py tests/v1/test_memory_management.py tests/benchmarks/test_cachegen.py tests/v1/mp_observability/test_event_recorder.py tests/v1/multiprocess/test_completion_recorder.py -q 2>&1 | grep -vE 'garbage collected|I/O operation|Logging error|logger.warning|__del__|Message:|Arguments:|Call stack:|stream.write|LMCache INFO|LMCache WARNING'

bash -c cd projects/LMCache/src && python3 -m pytest -p no:cacheprovider tests/v1/test_mem_kernels.py tests/v1/test_mp_mem_kernels.py tests/v1/test_c_ops_fallback_parity.py tests/v1/test_python_ops_fallback.py tests/v1/test_memory_management.py tests/v1/test_gpu_connector.py tests/benchmarks/test_cachegen.py -q 2>&1 | grep -vE 'garbage collected|I/O operation|Logging error|logger.warning|__del__|Message:|Arguments:|Call stack:|stream.write|LMCache INFO|LMCache WARNING'
bash -c BUILD_WITH_HIP=1 CXX=hipcc PYTORCH_ROCM_ARCH=gfx90a python3 setup.py build_ext --inplace
bash -c cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/LMCache/src && BUILD_WITH_HIP=1 CXX=hipcc PYTORCH_ROCM_ARCH=gfx90a python3 setup.py build_ext --inplace

bash -c 
    set -e
    SRC=/var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/LMCache/src
    cd "$SRC"

    # GPU tests (numpy 1.26.4)
    HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=2 python3 -m pytest tests/v1/test_mem_kernels.py tests/v1/test_mp_mem_kernels.py \
      tests/v1/test_c_ops_fallback_parity.py tests/v1/test_python_ops_fallback.py \
      tests/v1/test_memory_management.py tests/v1/test_gpu_connector.py \
      -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -5

    # Upgrade numpy for recorders (cupy needs numpy>=2)
    pip install "numpy>=2.0" -q 2>&1 | grep -v notice
    HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=2 python3 -m pytest \
      tests/v1/mp_observability/test_event_recorder.py \
      tests/v1/multiprocess/test_completion_recorder.py \
      -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -3

    # Restore numpy for GPU connector compat
    pip install "numpy==1.26.4" -q 2>&1 | grep -v notice

    # Non-GPU regression
    python3 -m pytest tests/test_serde.py tests/v1/test_config.py \
      tests/v1/test_token_database.py tests/v1/test_cache_policy.py \
      tests/v1/native_storage_ops/ tests/v1/storage_backend/test_fs_connector.py \
      -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -3
